description: Magic Patterns is a design and UI generation product that helps users create, iterate on, and export designs and code. It also supports design systems and AI-assisted workflows for moving between prompts, designs, and implementation.
summary: Magic Patterns exposes a v3 REST API, a legacy v2 REST API, and an MCP server at `https://mcp.magicpatterns.com/mcp`; all documented developer surfaces use the same Magic Patterns API key.
